widgets_values:
Note: If you want to use SEED HUNT, toggle the seed_hunt button to TRUE. Then generate your clip. Choose your preffered seed and then hit Seed 1,2,3,4 on the Timeline UI. The workflow will then generate stage 2 LTX sampler and complete with your chosen seed.

To use the regular LTX Director without seed hunt, toggle seed_hunt to off.

properties.local_prompts:
[VISUAL] Subtle, natural micro-movements — a soft blink, the smile settling from broad to relaxed and warm, slight head tilt as if listening to a reply. Eyes stay engaged with camera throughout.
[CINEMATOGRAPHY] Camera locked static, no movement — this is a direct, intimate conversational frame, let the performance carry it.
[CHARACTER MOTION] Gentle shoulder shift and a small hand movement toward the mic stand, natural conversational body language, breathing visible in subtle chest movement.
[SOUNDS] Quiet office ambience, soft room tone under the mic.
